situation: Touch files under ~ or /Volumes (outside the Cowork sandbox)
note: Built-in Read/Write/Edit only reach connected folders. filesystem-enhanced reaches the whole Mac.

situation: Run a command on Mikey's real Mac, his LAN, or pop over ssh
note: The sandbox bash has no LAN route. system_exec runs as bard on the Mac; ssh user@192.168.x.x for pop. Use git CLI through it for all git work.

situation: Session start, remembering, or recalling anything from past sessions
note: brain_init at session start. Write memories DURING work, not at the end. After tasks: brain_reflect.

situation: Launching or monitoring a training / distillation / fine-tuning run
note: Read protocol training-run-management first. tmux pane for visibility, native W&B, step-stamped checkpoints, verify liftoff after 30s.

situation: Current-world facts, papers, citations, anything post-cutoff
note: Search before claiming. For HF models/datasets/papers there are also hf paper_search / hub_repo_search tools.

situation: MCP server or tool failures, errors, broken tools
note: registry_summary shows active/broken/unconfigured. Logs at ~/Library/Logs/Claude/. Protocol: tool-auto-repair.

situation: What time is it / elapsed time / any time-of-day assumption
note: Never guess the time; response timestamps come from this.

situation: Locating a project or code on the Mac
note: Check the filesystem before claiming something does or does not exist.

situation: Context running long / handoff to a future session
note: Write the continuation note BEFORE context is lost. Protocol: auto-continuation.

situation: Verifying claims, math, or suspicious confident reasoning
note: Compute, don't assert. Run numbers through code; skills: pattern-match-check.
